DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-30-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT EVELYN SABUGO'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; REQUEST FOR REASONABLE SANCTIONS AND ATTORNEYS' FEES, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION ARE GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED; RESPONSES TO BE PROVIDED WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THE HEARING. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $810.00 PAYABLE WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THE HEARING. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING THE RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA GREY; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Dec-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
W. Isaac Maing (408-564-7278; imaing@maingco.com) for Plaintiff.
Alicia L. Queen (510-457-3462; alicia.queen@farmersinsurance.com) of Stratman, Schwartz & Williams-Abrego for Defendant.
Court reporter: Teresa Kenworthy, CSR #6673 (530-308-2691; tkenworthy@gmail.com)

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EVELYN SABUGO's MOTION To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted is GRANTED. CCP 2033.280. No timely opposition filed. Sanctions related to a motion under CCP 2033.280 are mandatory. Sanctions granted in the amount of $500 ($250/hour for 2 hours), payable by December 31, 2020.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the tentative ruling via email to sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Request For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorneys? Fees; Declaration Of Alicia L. Queen
Off Calendar Jul-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT EVELYN SABUGO'S Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories; Request For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorneys' Fees.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant's Motion to Compel further responses to Form and Special Interrogatories, Demand for Production are GRANTED as unopposed; responses to be provided within 20 days of the hearing. Defendant is awarded sanctions in the amount of $810.00 payable within 20 days of the hearing.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating the ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Grey; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
